CheckTitle: Linode Cloud Firewall default inbound policy is DROP
Description: Linode Cloud Firewalls are checked to ensure the default inbound policy is DROP.
Risk: If the default inbound policy is not DROP, traffic not explicitly controlled by rules may be allowed, increasing exposure.

Code.Other:
1. Log in to the Linode Cloud Manager
2. Navigate to Firewalls
3. Select the associated firewall
4. In the Rules tab, set the default inbound policy to DROP

Recommendation.Text: Set default inbound policy to DROP and only allow explicitly required inbound traffic.
